headline: Charter Communications (CHTR) On Starlink And Cox Talks Faces A New Valuation Test
summary: Charter Communications (CHTR) is back in focus after reports of talks with SpaceX on a Starlink-powered mobile service and planning around a possible Cox acquisition, alongside pressure from tougher broadband competition. See our latest analysis for Charter Communications. Charter Communications’ share price has come under clear pressure, with the stock down 40.3% over the past 90 days and the 1 year total shareholder return declining 66.7%. This suggests recent news is feeding concerns about...

headline: Charter (CHTR) Explores SpaceX Mobile Tie Up And Cox Acquisition Talks
summary: Charter Communications is reportedly in talks with SpaceX to use Starlink satellites for its mobile services. The company is also said to be exploring a potential acquisition of Cox, a large US cable and broadband operator. These discussions come as Charter Communications, NasdaqGS:CHTR, trades around $130.73 per share. Charter Communications, NasdaqGS:CHTR, is drawing attention with reports of talks around both satellite powered mobile services and a possible industry consolidation move...
